case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. LOUIS ALESSANDRIA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALESSANDRIA, LOUIS $6,628.07 PRINCIPAL, $244.98 INTEREST, $274.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,147.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ALESSANDRIA, LOUIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-12-2010
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $274.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ALESSANDRIA, LOUIS
